criteria_verification.criterion_text: Factory delegates to `create_deep_agent` with correct kwargs
criteria_verification.evidence: create_player calls create_deep_agent(model=model, tools=tools, system_prompt=system_prompt, memory=memory, backend=backend) with all kwargs forwarded correctly. criteria_verification.criterion_text: `FilesystemBackend` is instantiated and passed as `backend` kwarg
criteria_verification.evidence: FilesystemBackend(root_dir='.') is instantiated and passed as backend= kwarg to create_deep_agent. criteria_verification.criterion_text: Empty system prompt raises a validation error
